findings.detail: 15 templates feels like a lot to scan at once
findings.proposed_solution: show a short 'best for' description on each template chip

findings.detail: the template names may still feel a bit hard to compare quickly
findings.proposed_solution: highlight one recommended template and palette for a wellness business

findings.detail: chat accepts input, but the send/reset behavior may feel abrupt if I don’t know what happened
findings.proposed_solution: add a simple confirmation after chat messages send so it feels responsive

findings.detail: 3 palettes is fine, but I may want clearer guidance on which one fits my business best
findings.proposed_solution: keep Save clearly visible and reassuring since I’ll want to know my changes are safe

warnings.detail: 15 templates feels like a lot to scan at once
